about.intro: Welcome to my portfolio! I'm a passionate developer with expertise in multiple tech stacks.

With experience in both frontend and backend development, I create seamless user experiences combined with robust server architecture. I'm constantly learning and exploring new technologies to stay at the cutting edge of development.
